BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: NATHAN B & FLORENCE R BURT FOUNDATION

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: Applications must be submitted in a prescribed format determined by the Foundation. Please visit www.burtfoundation.org to download the most recent grant materials and application form.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: The Foundation accepts grant applications and approves grants once a year.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: Early childhood development and education; programs to improve high school graduation rates in Colorado.
